description: [Baseline] Capture and record current production-style perf trace of /msp/tickets (LCP, render delay, first-load JS, prefetch count) in SCRATCHPAD as the before-state
[Baseline] Record `next build` first-load JS for the tickets-list route and the chunk graph membership of the 7 dialogs + ClientDetails
[A] Add prefetch={false} to the ticket-number column <Link> in ticket-columns.tsx (~line 219)
[A] Add prefetch={false} to the title column <Link> in ticket-columns.tsx (~line 273)
[A] Verify ticket row click still opens the ticket via onTicketClick (no behavior change)
[A] Verify middle-click / cmd+click / open-in-new-tab on a row still navigates to /msp/tickets/[id]
[B] Extract the ClientDetails 'details' tab content (tabContent[0]) into a standalone lightweight component that does NOT statically import the contacts/billing/interactions/notes/Hudu tabs
[B] Rebuild ClientQuickView.tsx to render the lightweight details-tab component directly instead of wrapping full <ClientDetails quickView />
[B] Ensure ClientQuickView output is visually identical to the previous quickView details tab (header, fields, drawer chrome)
[B] Refactor full-page ClientDetails to consume the same extracted details-tab component (single source of truth, no duplication)
[B] Wire tickets-list drawer (MspTicketsPageClient.tsx:18) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire ticket-detail client drawer (MspTicketDetailsContainerClient.tsx:71) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire MspClientDrawerProvider.tsx:36 to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire MspBillingDashboardClient.tsx:18 to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire MspClientIntegrationProvider.tsx:44 (projects integration) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire clients page quick view (Clients.tsx:1779) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire interactions client quick view (InteractionDetails.tsx:209) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire projects client quick view (Projects.tsx renderClientDetails ~1024) to ClientQuickView
[B] Wire settings user list client quick view (UserList.tsx:206) to ClientQuickView
[B] Classify contact-context <ClientDetails> usages (Contacts.tsx:697, MspContactTickets.tsx:230) and migrate to ClientQuickView if they are client quick views (per OQ4)
[B] Confirm full ClientDetails (all tabs) is no longer in the tickets-list route chunk graph after rewiring
[C-infra] Add server/src/app/msp/tickets/layout.tsx hosting {children} + @modal parallel slot
[C-infra] Add server/src/app/msp/tickets/@modal/default.tsx returning null (closed state)
[C-infra] Create a tickets-segment client context provider (in tickets/layout.tsx) exposing current filters
[C-infra] Extend the tickets-segment context to expose the current selectedTicketIds, lifted out of TicketingDashboard local state
[C-infra] Update TicketingDashboard to read/write selection + filters via the shared context (no behavior change)
[C-infra] Prototype Import dialog end-to-end as an intercepting route to validate the pattern (focus, scroll, back, refresh)
[C-import] Create msp/tickets/import route segment + (.)import intercepting modal rendering TicketImportDialog
[C-import] Replace the in-list Import trigger to navigate to the import route instead of toggling isImportDialogOpen
[C-import] Remove TicketImportDialog import from TicketingDashboard
[C-export] Create msp/tickets/export route segment + (.)export intercepting modal rendering TicketExportDialog
[C-export] Ensure export reads the current filters from the shared context and exports the filtered set
[C-export] Replace in-list Export trigger with navigation; remove TicketExportDialog import from TicketingDashboard
[C-bulk] Bulk Assign: route segment + (.) intercepting modal, reads selection+filters from context, calls existing bulk-assign action
[C-bulk] Bulk Add Tags: route segment + intercepting modal wired to context + existing action
[C-bulk] Bulk Set Due Date: route segment + intercepting modal wired to context + existing action
[C-bulk] Bulk Change Status: route segment + intercepting modal wired to context + existing action
[C-bulk] Bulk Change Priority: route segment + intercepting modal wired to context + existing action
[C-bulk] Remove all 5 bulk dialog imports from TicketingDashboard once routes are live
[C-bulk] Preserve BulkTicketActionBar (selection toolbar) on the list as the trigger surface (lightweight, stays)
[Verify] Confirm 0 per-row RSC prefetch requests fire on list load (DoD-3)
[Verify] Confirm the 7 dialogs are absent from the tickets-list route chunk graph in next build (DoD-2)
[Verify] Re-run perf trace; record new LCP / render delay / first-load JS vs baseline in SCRATCHPAD (DoD-1)
[Verify] Confirm no next/dynamic / React.lazy / import() introduced anywhere in the changes (DoD-6)
[Verify] Visual diff / manual pass confirming no end-user visual change to dialogs or client drawer (DoD-5, C1)
